missing_information.item: Audited financial statements for the latest three fiscal years.
missing_information.suggested_source: Request from management; required for IC presentation and typically included in S-1 or data room.

missing_information.item: Gross margin breakdown by revenue line (compute, storage, managed services).
missing_information.suggested_source: Request detailed P&L from management with gross margin allocation per product line.

missing_information.item: Unit economics including CAC and LTV (not just payback period).
missing_information.suggested_source: Request unit economics model from FP&A team; should be available given disclosed payback period and customer contracts.

missing_information.item: Cohort retention by customer vintage (gross/net dollar retention by signing year).
missing_information.suggested_source: Request cohort analysis from RevOps or Finance; critical for SaaS/cloud business model validation.

missing_information.item: Monthly burn rate calculation based on operating loss and cash balance trends.
missing_information.suggested_source: Derive from quarterly cash flow statements or request monthly P&L and cash movement report.

missing_information.item: Full debt structure including maturity schedule, interest rates, and covenant details beyond summary risk disclosures.
missing_information.suggested_source: Request debt term sheets and credit agreements from Treasury or Legal team.

missing_information.item: Auditor history and any recent auditor changes or qualifications.
missing_information.suggested_source: Check auditor signature and opinion paragraph in audited financials; if none, request disclosure from CFO.

missing_information.item: Market sizing methodology detailing how $399B TAM was derived (bottom-up vs top-down, assumptions, sources).
missing_information.suggested_source: Request market model appendix or third-party research backing TAM/SAM/SOM figures.

missing_information.item: Customer references or NPS/CSAT data validating platform satisfaction and retention drivers.
missing_information.suggested_source: Request anonymized customer survey results or arrange reference calls via Sales Ops.

missing_information.item: Pricing power evidence such as historical price increases without material churn or contraction.
missing_information.suggested_source: Request pricing history and elasticity analysis from Product or Finance team.

missing_information.item: Sales-efficiency metrics (e.g., CAC ratio, magic number) and go-to-market cost structure by channel.
missing_information.suggested_source: Request sales productivity dashboard from Head of Sales or RevOps.

missing_information.item: Average sales cycle length and win rates by customer segment or deal size.
missing_information.suggested_source: Request pipeline analytics from CRM system via Sales Operations.

missing_information.item: Detailed management background including prior roles, exits, and track record for all named executives.
missing_information.suggested_source: Request LinkedIn profiles or executive bios with employment history from HR or IR.

missing_information.item: Organizational structure chart showing reporting lines and headcount distribution by function.
missing_information.suggested_source: Request org chart from People Ops or CEO office; standard in late-stage diligence.

missing_information.item: Internal controls documentation and status of remediation plan for disclosed material weaknesses.
missing_information.suggested_source: Request SOX 404 documentation and audit committee updates from Controller or external auditor.

missing_information.item: Technology stack scalability assessment including architecture diagrams and capacity planning models.
missing_information.suggested_source: Request infrastructure review from CTO or engineering leadership; may require technical due diligence.

missing_information.item: Regulatory licenses and compliance status for operating cloud infrastructure across U.S. states and European jurisdictions.
missing_information.suggested_source: Request compliance matrix from Legal or Regulatory Affairs team.

missing_information.item: Comprehensive list of pending or threatened litigation beyond generic risk factor disclosures.
missing_information.suggested_source: Request litigation schedule from General Counsel or outside counsel; standard in S-1 but may be incomplete.

missing_information.item: Disclosure of all related-party transactions including terms, counterparties, and board approvals.
missing_information.suggested_source: Request related-party transaction register from Audit Committee or Legal.

missing_information.item: IP ownership documentation including assignments from founders/employees and open-source compliance audits.
missing_information.suggested_source: Request IP schedule and assignment agreements from Legal; may require counsel review.
